title: Improvement notice issued to Tameside Metropolitan Borough Council: March 2025
body: "This improvement notice requires Tameside Metropolitan Borough Council to take steps to improve its special educational needs and disabilities (SEND) services.  It is issued as a as a result of poor progress against the actions and deliverables in the Special Educational Needs and Disability Written Statement of Action (WSoA).   This improvement notice is closed. A revised improvement notice issued to Tameside Metropolitan Borough Council in August 2025 replaces it.   "

taxons.title: Support for special educational needs and disability (SEND)
Inspections of local authority children's services
